race.description: Crown Hotel Motel Country Boosted Showcase Mdn Plate
race.comment: KOBI EXPRESS (4) returned from a four-month spell with a game second last start over this distance at Coffs Harbour where he was prominent all the way. Back in good shape and from an ideal gate gets every chance to go one better. PRESTIGE PRINCE (5) has not been sighted since making late inroads for a midfield finish on debut over this trip at Moruya in October. Has travelled a long way for this race - keep a close eye on the betting. BIRDY GIRL (6) returns after a seven-month spell. Produced an eye-catcher over this distance at Port Macquarie when fresh from a spell last prep. Trialled in good style recently so a positive return is anticipated. FUNKY COLD MEDINA (2) improves at each appearance including a nice second at Inverell at the latest appearance. Sure to give a good account again. FARNISHED (1) has transferred from Waterhouse/Bott to the St Vincent yard and is fresh from a 32-week break. Market the best pointer.
